sections.text: THE ACE OF WANDS – Sun – Mars – Courage Cards Page
sudden illumination, enthusiasm, inspiration, creativity, spiritual hunger, vigor, energy
Destruction through exaggeration, false start, vexation, cancellation
fire, high or strong energy, transformation
You are full of power and energy. Start exploring where and how you can and want to use this.
What attracts you most, what do you like to do? What do you find most enjoyable? In what framework can you fulfill your dreams?
Draw more cards for the above questions!
I express my power and energy openly.
My life is filled with abundance and joyful happenstance.
